pageContent:
Profile: Full Stack Developer 
Industry: Publishing / Self-Publishing 
Job Location:  E2 Plot No. 4, Jhandewalan Extension, Metro Station Gate No. 2, New Delhi 
– 110055 
Employment Type: Full-time 
 
 
ABOUT BOOKLEAF PUBLISHING 
BookLeaf Publishing is one of India’s leading independent self-publishing houses, processing

1,200+ books every month across a catalog of 22,000+ titles. We operate across India and the 
US, run our own warehouse and in-house printing facility in Delhi, and have been featured on 
Shark Tank India Season 4. Our mission is to make publishing accessible, transparent, and 
technology-driven for authors everywhere. 
We are a small, fast-moving team that punches well above its weight—powered by automation,

smart systems, and a bias for shipping. If you thrive in environments where you own outcomes 
end to end, you’ll fit right in. 
THE ROLE 
We’re looking for a Full-Stack Developer who can take ownership of our entire technology 
stack—from our customer-facing author dashboard and internal operations tools to the 
AI-powered automations and integrations that keep our publishing engine running. You won’t just

write code; you’ll architect systems, make technical decisions, and directly shape how thousands 
of authors experience BookLeaf. 
This role sits at the intersection of product engineering and AI integration. You’ll work on 
everything from building and improving web applications to setting up intelligent workflows using 
AI APIs and automation platforms. 
WHAT YOU’LL DO 
• Build & Scale Web Applications: Design, develop, and maintain our author-facing

dashboard, internal tools, and operations software. Take features from concept to 
production. 
• AI & LLM Integration: Integrate AI capabilities into our products and 
workflows—connecting platforms like OpenAI, building intelligent automations, managing 
API keys, and ensuring reliable AI-powered features in production.

• Automation & Workflow Engineering: Design and manage automation pipelines using 
tools like n8n, connecting databases, APIs, payment systems, and third-party services into 
seamless workflows. 
• API Development & Integration: Build and consume RESTful APIs, integrate third-party 
services (payment gateways, print APIs, distribution platforms), and ensure robust data 
flow across systems. 
• Database & Infrastructure: Manage databases, optimize queries, handle deployments,

and ensure our systems are performant, secure, and scalable. 
• Technical Leadership: Evaluate architecture decisions, recommend tools and 
frameworks, mentor junior developers, and establish best practices for code quality and 
documentation. 
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with the founding team to translate 
business requirements into technical solutions. Communicate technical trade-offs clearly to 
non-technical stakeholders. 
WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR 
• Strong full-stack development experience with proficiency in both frontend (React, 
Next.js, or similar) and backend (Node.js, Python, or similar) technologies. 
• Hands-on experience with AI/ML integration: working with LLM APIs (OpenAI, 
Anthropic, etc.), building AI-powered features, prompt engineering, and understanding how 
to reliably deploy AI in production applications. 
• Experience with automation platforms such as n8n, Make, or Zapier—including building

complex multi-step workflows, handling error scenarios, and connecting to external APIs. 
• Solid understanding of databases (SQL and/or NoSQL), API design (REST, webhooks), 
authentication systems, and cloud infrastructure. 
• Demonstrated ability to own projects end to end: from scoping and architecture through 
deployment and monitoring. 
• Familiarity with Bubble (or willingness to learn it quickly): Our entire operations

currently run on Bubble, and while we’re planning a long-term migration to a fully 
code-based platform, you’ll need to maintain, improve, and build on the existing Bubble 
dashboard in the interim. Prior Bubble experience is ideal, but we’re equally open to 
someone who can pick it up fast. 
• Excellent problem-solving skills and a track record of building systems that are clean, 
maintainable, and well-documented.

maintainable, and well-documented. 
• Strong communication skills: ability to articulate technical concepts to non-technical 
team members and collaborate effectively in a startup environment. 
BONUS POINTS 
• Experience with payment gateway integrations (Razorpay, Stripe). 
• Familiarity with e-commerce platforms (Shopify) and print-on-demand workflows. 
• Experience with DevOps practices: CI/CD, containerization, VPS management.

• Understanding of publishing, media, or content industry workflows. 
• Prior experience in a startup where you wore multiple hats. 
WHY BOOKLEAF? 
• Work directly with the founders in a high-impact role where your contributions are visible 
from day one. 
• Shape the technology direction of a fast-growing publishing company at a pivotal stage of 
its journey. 
• Be at the forefront of AI integration in an industry ripe for innovation.

• A culture that values ownership, speed, and building things that matter for real authors. 
 
HOW TO APPLY 
Send your resume along with links to your portfolio, GitHub, or any live projects to 
hr@bookleafpub.com 
Please include a brief note on why you’re excited about this role.
